merged_events.event_description: U.S. Ambassador to the Philippines Thomas C. Hubbard was accredited to Palau, remaining resident in Manila, establishing nonresident ambassadorial relations.

evidence.quote: On December 6, 1996, U.S. Ambassador to the Philippines Thomas C. Hubbard was accredited to Palau; he remained resident at Manila.

merged_events.event_description: The American Embassy in Koror was established, with Deborah L. Kingsland as Chargé d'Affaires, ending the nonresident ambassadorial arrangement.

evidence.quote: The American Embassy in Koror was established on October 10, 2004, with Deborah L. Kingsland as Chargé d'Affaires.

merged_events.event_description: Ambassador Reed presented credentials and left 'post' (not Manila), suggesting a transition to a resident embassy in Palau.

evidence.quote: Rowe Helen Patricia Reed, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 2010-08-09. Credentials presented: 2010-09-30. Left post on 2013-07-26.

matched.notes: Exact match on date (1996-12-06) and status (Ambassador Nonresident). RDCR confirms accreditation of nonresident ambassador.
Exact match on date (2004-10-10) and status (Embassy). RDCR confirms establishment of American Embassy in Koror.
